style: 3D smooth matte plastic toy — Studio Ghibli meets Duolingo warmth

role_definition._doc: 小靜 = 品牌主持人，不是裝飾貼圖。
allowed_tasks: Opening question — interact with hero object
forbidden_tasks: Stealing visual attention from hero object

locked_identity._doc: 3D 小靜的 DNA，永遠不變。每次生成必須以 reference image 為準。
locked_identity.construction: 3D smooth matte plastic toy figure, big round head, compact body, short limbs, visible seam lines on head/ears
locked_identity.proportion: Head-to-body ratio ~1:1, super-deformed cute proportion, consistent across all poses

body.pattern: round dark brown spots on arms, body, and tail (NOT stripes, NOT tabby)
body.material: smooth matte plastic, no fur texture, no pores

head.forehead: two white vertical stripes, thick and prominent (key species identifier)
head.ears: black with tiny white ear-back spots, slight seam line visible
head.eyes: big round dark brown eyes with white highlight dots, ~35% of face

locked_identity.tail: short with clear dark ring/spot markings, NOT tabby stripes

apron.icon: white bowl with leaf sprout, centered on chest
apron.style: simple, clean, part of the toy figure

material_spec.finish: low gloss, like a premium vinyl toy (Pop Mart / Sonny Angel quality)
material_spec.lighting: studio softbox, front-top slightly left, subtle warm rim light
material_spec.background_for_standalone: muted pastel / morandi palette solid color

outfit._doc: 3D 版服裝都是 apron 色變化。預設 sage green apron with bowl-leaf icon。

apron.description: Sage green apron with white bowl-leaf icon (default)
apron.prompt_fragment: wearing sage green apron with small white bowl-leaf icon on chest
apron.when: 飲食、烹調、營養主題 (預設)

none.prompt_fragment: no apron or accessories, just the natural leopard cat character

sport_vest.description: Light blue sport vest, same matte plastic material
sport_vest.prompt_fragment: wearing a light blue sport vest, same smooth matte plastic material

sleep_cap.description: Small beige nightcap with tiny star
sleep_cap.prompt_fragment: wearing a small beige nightcap with tiny star, same smooth matte plastic

doctor_coat.prompt_fragment: wearing a tiny simplified white doctor coat, same smooth matte plastic

expressions._doc: 3D 版表情以微妙差異為主，不要誇張卡通化。配合 expression_map 使用。

default.description: Gentle open eyes, small warm smile, standing naturally
default.prompt_fragment: gentle open eyes, small warm smile, standing naturally, calm and trustworthy
default.use_case: 片頭、頻道 logo、預設出場

surprised.description: Slightly wider eyes, subtle O-shaped mouth
surprised.prompt_fragment: slightly wider eyes, subtle surprised expression, small O mouth, hands slightly raised
surprised.use_case: 認知反差 hook、「真的假的」

thinking.description: One paw touching chin, curious eyes, head slightly tilted
thinking.prompt_fragment: one paw touching chin, curious eyes looking slightly up, head tilted, thoughtful

happy.prompt_fragment: crescent squinting eyes, joyful warm smile, radiating gentle happiness

reminder.description: Bright eyes, confident smile, one paw pointing up
reminder.prompt_fragment: bright attentive eyes, confident smile, one paw raised with index finger up, sharing a tip

goodbye.description: Sweet smile, one paw waving toward viewer
goodbye.prompt_fragment: sweet warm smile, one paw waving toward viewer, friendly farewell

worried.description: Eyebrows slightly raised, small frown, concerned
worried.prompt_fragment: eyebrows slightly raised inward, small worried frown, concerned caring look

proud.description: Chin slightly raised, confident closed smile, hands on hips
proud.prompt_fragment: chin slightly raised, confident closed smile, both paws on hips, satisfied

expression_headline_map._doc: Prevents emotion mismatch. Reviewer checks this.

negative_prompt: no tiger stripes, no tabby markings, no domestic cat, no realistic fur texture, no glossy material, no multiple mascots, no text, no watermark, no busy background, no harsh shadows, no corner mascot decoration
